text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: jbeich

Log:
  multimedia/handbrake: fix r521913 upstreaming issues

  - Unbreak QSV build on non-FreeBSD
  - LIBHB.dll is only used on MinGW
  - No need to touch __deps__, just exclude MODULE

  PR:		242849
